content.summary: He is the best! 🚀 Prince Canuma (@Prince_Canuma) Just implemented Google’s TurboQuant in MLX and the results are wild! Needle-in-a-haystack using Qwen3.5-35B-A3B across 8.5K, 32.7K, and 64.2K context lengths: → 6/6 exact match at every quant level → TurboQuant 2.5-bit: 4.9x smaller KV cache → TurboQuant 3.5-bit: 3.8x smaller KV cache The best part: Zero accuracy loss compared to full KV cache. — https://nitter.net/Prince_Canuma/status/2036611007523512397#m
content.full_text:
Post title: He is the best! 🚀

Post summary: He is the best! 🚀 Prince Canuma (@Prince_Canuma) Just implemented Google’s TurboQuant in MLX and the results are wild! Needle-in-a-haystack using Qwen3.5-35B-A3B across 8.5K, 32.7K, and 64.2K context lengths: → 6/6 exact match at every quant level → TurboQuant 2.5-bit: 4.9x smaller KV cache → TurboQuant 3.5-bit: 3.8x smaller KV cache The best part: Zero accuracy loss compared to full KV cache. — https://nitter.net/Prince_Canuma/status/2036611007523512397#m

Canonical URL: https://x.com/ivanfioravanti/status/2036689840931016877

fact_anchors: He is the best! 🚀 Prince Canuma (@Prince_Canuma) Just implemented Google’s TurboQuant in MLX and the results are wild! Needle-in-a-haystack using Qwen3.5-35B-A3B across 8.5K, 32.7K, and 64.2K context lengths: → 6/6 exact match at every quant level → TurboQuant 2.5-bit: 4.9x smaller KV cache → TurboQuant 3.5-bit: 3.8x smaller KV cache The best part: Zero accuracy loss compared to full KV cache. — https://nitter.net/Prince_Canuma/status/2036611007523512397#m
